title: Biome Book
description: Biome Book allows you to track the biomes you have visited with the goal of being compatible with other mods.
body: # Biome Book Biome Book allows you to track the biomes you have visited with the goal of being compatible with other mods. The code has to be rewritten for newer Minecraft versions so please bare with me! To get the book, just use the following command in chat: ``` /give @s lavender:biome_book ``` In the next update, players will obtain the book after joining a world for the first time. If you are a mod developer, please see: https://docs.wispforest.io/lavender/writing-extensions/ ![Preview Image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PbVD63Ps/images/5998f6dfd33e65aa2ff816a72c2084b372cfb311.png) ![Preview Image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PbVD63Ps/images/991740b7d4fd9225df3db1c192c859a54766ac18.png) Biome Book is currently in beta so please report any issues found here: [https://github.com/Mildzz/BiomeBook/issues](https://github.com/Mildzz/BiomeBook/issues)
